changeSet.author: micko112
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO category (name, parent_id) SELECT 'Venčanica', id FROM category WHERE name = 'Venčanice i svečane haljine' AND parent_id = 10000
INSERT INTO category (name, parent_id) SELECT 'Večernja haljina', id FROM category WHERE name = 'Venčanice i svečane haljine' AND parent_id = 10000
